name: maze of pits
description: I'm in a maze of pits
items_start: Sign here says `Opposite of LIGHT is UNLIGHT`
hints: The sign gives a clue about a command you can use. This is a confusing maze - map it carefully.
UNLIGHT means you can turn off your lamp to conserve fuel. The maze has 6 rooms (12-17).
To navigate the maze: from here, go NORTH or DOWN to room 13, then WEST to room 14. The treasure (Persian Rug) is in room 17.
notes: Entrance to the pit maze (rooms 12-17). The sign hints that UNLIGHT LAMP conserves fuel. This maze must be mapped carefully as directions are confusing. Reached from the large cavern (room 7) by going DOWN.
